posts.author: elitemmapicks
posts.content:
[Predictions]

Brunno Ferreira vs Ikram Aliskerov
Pick: Aliskerov via round 1 KO
87% of Tapology users (23 users) are picking Aliskerov (53% KO)
Aliskerov is 0.1 years younger (33.6 vs 33.7)
Aliskerov has 4” reach edge (76” vs 72”)
Aliskerov has +1.39 strike differential/min vs -0.14
Aliskerov proj. +14.2 significant strikes attempted
Aliskerov proj. +10.5 significant strikes landed
Aliskerov proj. +13.0 head strikes landed
Ferreira proj. 0.82 knockdowns vs 0.79
Aliskerov proj. 2.6 takedowns landed (5.3 attempts) vs 0.6 (5.4 attempts)
Ferreira proj. 44.2% finish chance vs 39.9% and 15.9% decision
Projected rounds: 1.1 (5.6 mins)
12/17 wins for Aliskerov via finish (8/12 in round 1)
5/7 KO’s for Aliskerov were in round 1
Ferreira has 9:2 KO win/loss ratio (2/2 times KO’d were in round 1)
Ferreira was KO’d in round 1 last fight vs Gregory Rodrigues

posts.author: elitemmapicks
posts.content:
[Predictions]

Michel Pereira vs Shara Magomedov
Pick: Magomedov via decision
93% of Tapology users (84 users) are picking Magomedov (54% decision)
Magomedov is 0.6 years younger (32.1 vs 32.7)
Both fighters have 73” reach
Pereira is from Brazil, Magomedov is from Russia (event is in Azerbaijan)
Magomedov has +2.08 strike differential/min vs +0.06
Magomedov proj. +22.8 significant strikes attempted
Magomedov proj. +14.4 significant strikes landed
Magomedov proj. +11.5 head strikes landed
Magomedov proj. 0.19 knockdowns vs 0.13
Pereira proj. 0.9 takedowns landed (2.2 attempts) vs 0.0 (0.0 attempts)
Pereira proj. 0.70 submission attempts vs 0.00
Magomedov proj. 39.5% finish chance vs 20.8% and 39.7% decision
Projected rounds: 2.4 (12.2 mins)
12/16 wins for Magomedov are via KO (7/12 in round 1)
Pereira has been KO’d 3 times in 46 fights (6.5%)
2/3 times KO’d for Pereira were in round 1
Pereira got KO’d in 43 seconds in Aug 2025 vs Kyle Daukaus
Magomedov will likely win distance striking
Magomedov via decision is safer play on Tapology
